A semicolon was the wrong punctuation here. Also, [[MOS:FIGURES]] calls for consistency in numerals versus words when numbers are in close proximity. I changed these to numerals because of the "16" earlier in the same sentence.

The criticism was from several news organizations, not just ''The Guardian''. So, no reason to single them out.

There is legitimate controversy around the FIFA Peace Prize, especially given there was little advance notice that it had been created and no indication that it will actually be awarded again.

move Peace Prize into an Awards section. It is still an Award, whether it is deemed controversial or not.

see [[WP:DEPS]]: "Citing the source as a reference is generally prohibited, especially when other more reliable sources exist"

/* FIFA Peace Prize */Added {{main}}. Although the target article was nominated to be merged with this one, there is an ongoing discussion regarding whether the decision to do so was valid. As such, the link should remain until a decision is made.

/* Venues */Doesn't it look good? Please, I've checked it in every mode, and it looks terrible and disorganized the way you're doing it. There's just one thing: your editing was arbitrary. You'd be better off watching basketball, chopping wood, or praying, you nosy Oregonian. Why are you coming here to give your opinion and get involved in soccer issues, especially since the World Cup isn't even being held in your state?. Greetings.
Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/Luigimario03|Luigimario03]] ([[User talk:Luigimario03|talk]]) to last revision by Assadzadeh

/* Venues */ Returning this list to how it worked before without all the unnecessary column breaking; it was going to look bad no matter what device you used, and it worked just fine with defined column breaks.

/* Ticket registration and allocations */ corrected the date format. I kind of doubt this clause is needed here at all because it’s repetitious of information given elsewhere in the article, but someone else can decide that issue. I just want to clean up yet another incorrect date format.
Part 1 –Moving text that doesn't belong in the Controversies section, as there is a separate section for tickets.
Part 2 –Moved paragraph to more appropriate section
/* FIFA Peace Prize */ main article is now a [[WP:SELFRED]]
/* See also */Links to these articles are already included in the templates at the bottom of the page.
/* Final game halftime show */ adding link to corresponding Wikivoyage article
Added provinces to locations of training facilities in Canada to put them in line with the U.S. locations

Reverted [[WP:AGF|good faith]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Letsgetinreformation|Letsgetinreformation]] ([[User talk:Letsgetinreformation|talk]]): It's not necessary to add the province for every Canadian city, similar to how not every U.S. city has a state attached to it (e.g. Atlanta).

Added province for New Tecumseth. While I recognize not every city has a state/province listed, the smaller ones do, and as New Tecumseth is a tiny town most Canadians have never heard of, putting the province adds crucial context.
